routes.title: Onboarding | ConnectSphare

routes.bodySample: Back to Home Privacy Policy Last updated: 6/22/2026 1. Information We Collect We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create or modify your account, request on-demand services, contact customer support, or otherwise communicate with us. 2. How We Use Information We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, such as to process transactions, authenticate users, and provide customer support. 3. Information Sharing We do not share your personal information with third parties except as described in this privacy policy, such as with you
